/opt/homebrew/Cellar/emscripten/5.0.5/libexec/em++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=thin -sUSE_GLFW=3 -sUSE_WEBGL2=1 -sFULL_ES3=1 -sMIN_WEBGL_VERSION=2 -sMAX_WEBGL_VERSION=2 -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sINITIAL_MEMORY=134217728 -sSTACK_SIZE=1048576 -sEXIT_RUNTIME=0 -sFORCE_FILESYSTEM=1 -lidbfs.js "-sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=['FS','IDBFS','ccall','cwrap']" --shell-file /Users/factory/src/POM2/web/shell.html --preload-file /Users/factory/src/POM2/roms@/roms --preload-file /Users/factory/src/POM2/fonts@/fonts @CMakeFiles/pom2_imgui.dir/objects1.rsp -o POM2.html
